allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add SEO metadata, structured data, sitemap, and fix analytics

- Add robots.ts and sitemap.ts for search engine discovery
- Add JSON-LD structured data \(Article, Person, WebSite, BreadcrumbList\)
- Add canonical URLs, OpenGraph, and Twitter Card meta tags to all pages
- Add metadataBase and title template in root layout
- Create centralized siteConfig with author info and analytics config
- Fix App Insights by hardcoding connection string \(process.env not inlined in static export\)
- Enable Google Analytics \(G-Z2T21TW25T\) by adding tracking ID to siteConfig
- Update CSP to allow Google Analytics and additional App Insights domains

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix App Insights crash: remove incompatible history config from ReactPlugin

The ReactPlugin was configured with `history: window.history`, but it
expects a React Router history object with a `.listen\(\)` method. Since
Next.js doesn''t use React Router, this caused a TypeError on every page
load, preventing all App Insights telemetry from being sent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update Google Analytics Measurement ID for new GA4 data stream

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Google Analytics Measurement ID typo \(I vs 1\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
